evals.prompt: Create a Vue component that shows a list of API routes with method badges (GET, POST, DELETE), route paths, and status badges. It should look like a proper Konnect table with sortable columns and hover states.
evals.expected_output: A Vue 3 SFC with KTable-like markup, correct method badge colors (GET=green, POST=blue, DELETE=red), status badges, sortable header cells, hover row states, all using design tokens and @kong/kongponents imports.

evals.prompt: What are the exact colors and sizing specs for the danger alert? I need the background hex, text color, icon, padding, and border radius.
evals.expected_output: Direct answer citing: bg #ffe5e5 (Red 10), text #d60027 (Red 60), icon: danger, padding 12px (space-50), border-radius 6px (border-radius-30), gap 6px, min-height 44px. No code generation needed.

evals.prompt: Build a Services list page with a filter toolbar that has 2 quick filters (Status and Protocol), a search bar, and a More filters button. Include a table below showing service name, protocol badge, status badge, and an actions column. Use Kongponents.
evals.expected_output: A complete Vue 3 SFC page view with: filter toolbar (300px search, divider, 2 unapplied pills with dashed borders, More filters+ button), KTable-like data table with sample data, method/status badges, actions dropdown, all following design token specs.
